title: Read from xlsm
author: fhw-help
body:
I am currently working on an application where I have to read from an xlsm file.
Unfortunately I wasnt told that the application should deal with xlsm instead of xlsx.  Is there a way to get read only acces or do I have to change to another npm package?

comments.author: maticortesr
comments.body: Also facing this issue, any pointers appreciated

comments.author: Arlien
comments.body:
@fhw-help I don't know if it's still relevant, but I'd recommend you switching to [xlsx-populate](https://www.npmjs.com/package/xlsx-populate#parsing-data), which let's you read/write in XLSM ! (Of course, 'til exceljs allows to read/write xlsm too :))

Edit : it's not written on their doc that they support xlsm, but I'm currently using it on a project for my job and it works perfectly (tho it's rly only for data and not styling & more)
